meme:
Me: I'll sleep early tonight
Also me at 3am: 👁️👄👁️

My brain at 3am:
'Remember that embarrassing thing you did in 2009?' 😭

Me before payday: I'm broke 😭
Me after payday: *buys everything*
Me 2 days later: I'm broke 😭

Teacher: The exam is easy
The exam: 💀💀💀
Me pretending to understand what someone said after asking them to repeat it 3 times already 😅

My to-do list:
✅ Make to-do list
❌ Everything else

Alarm at 6am: ⏰
Me: I'll just close my eyes for 5 minutes
Me at 9am: 😱💀

Me: I won't spend money this month 💪
Online shopping at midnight: 👋😈

Diet starts Monday.
*Monday arrives*
Diet starts next Monday. 🍕

Me walking past a mirror:
'Who is that handsome person—oh wait, it's me' 😎

Group project:
1 person does everything 😤
3 people watch
1 person asks 'when is it due?' the day before 💀

Netflix: Are you still watching?
Me: Don't judge me. 😒

Reply in 0.0001 seconds to friends.
Work email sitting unread for 3 days: 🦗🦗🦗

Me explaining my problems to my dog:
Dog: 👁️👅👁️
Me: You understand me like no one else

Phone battery at 1%:
*Suddenly needs to do everything* 😂

When you're in a bad mood but then someone offers you food 🍔:
'I guess life is good' 😊

Me during the week: I need more sleep 😴
Weekend: *wakes up at 6am for no reason* 😡

Interviewer: Where do you see yourself in 5 years?
Me internally: Alive hopefully 😅

My wallet: Empty 💸
My appetite: Five-star restaurant energy 🍽️

Confidence level:
0%————————|————100%
              ⬆️ me
